description:
Under `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → Practical backlog summary Tier 1 continuous/background observation.

On `agent_end`, reconcile staged observation output into durable session state, and on the next `before_agent_start` inject only the published block so mid-turn raw context remains untouched.
title: Publish staged observations only at turn boundaries and inject only published state next turn
